summary: Completed backend testing for code quality fixes verification. All authentication endpoints tested successfully including XSS vulnerability fix, React hook dependencies, context value memoization, and Apple identity token verification enhancement.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - backend healthy with database connected
POST /api/auth/login with demo credentials (demo@familycareorganizer.com / Demo2026!) - returns token
POST /api/auth/apple with new user - creates user and returns token with token_verified field
POST /api/auth/apple with empty user_id - returns 400 error as expected
POST /api/auth/register with new user - creates user successfully
GET /api/auth/me with valid token - returns user data
POST /api/auth/google with google_user_id and email - works correctly
